content: Jeff Sackmann tennis_atp publishes ATP player, ranking, results, and match-stat files. Rankings are mostly complete from 1985 onward, 1982 is missing, and 1973-1984 are intermittent. Per season there can be tour-level main draw, qualifying/challenger, and futures match files; match stats are integer totals rather than percentages, and some tour-level rows lack stats. This supports an ATP-only canonical layer with explicit quarantine rules and coverage flags.
